evals.prompt: Find public GEO datasets of human breast cancer RNA-seq experiments — I need candidate GSE series to analyze.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-geo. Searches the GEO DataSets database (db='gds') via Entrez/E-utilities with a query combining the condition, organism (Homo sapiens[Organism]), and dataset type, and returns candidate GSE accessions with titles and sample counts.

assertions.value: Uses Entrez esearch on the gds database with organism and dataset-type qualifiers to surface candidate GEO series.

evals.prompt: Download GSE123456 and give me the processed expression matrix with the sample metadata so I can start analysis.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-geo. Uses GEOparse.get_GEO to download and parse GSE123456, extracts the expression matrix via pivot_samples('VALUE') (or the series matrix file), and surfaces per-sample metadata (titles, source, characteristics) from the GSM records.

assertions.value: Retrieves the GEO series with GEOparse and produces a genes-by-samples expression matrix plus sample metadata.

evals.prompt: From GSE123456, I've labeled which samples are control and which are treatment. Run differential expression between the two groups and give me the significant genes.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-geo. Loads the GSE123456 expression matrix via GEOparse, computes per-gene log2 fold changes and t-test p-values between control and treatment groups, applies Benjamini-Hochberg FDR correction, and returns genes passing q<0.05 and |log2FC|>1.

assertions.value: Computes fold changes and p-values between the two sample groups and applies multiple-testing (FDR/Benjamini-Hochberg) correction.

evals.prompt: Just fetch the SOFT family file for series GSE100001 directly via FTP so I can parse the full metadata offline.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-geo. Constructs the NCBI FTP path for the series (geo/series/GSE100nnn/GSE100001/soft/) and downloads GSE100001_family.soft.gz via FTP (or wget/curl), suitable for offline parsing.

assertions.value: Builds the correct GEO FTP directory path for the accession and downloads the SOFT family file.

evals.prompt: I have SRA run accession SRR1234567 — download the raw FASTQ sequencing reads from the ENA so I can realign them.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-ena. The user wants raw FASTQ reads by SRA run accession from the European Nucleotide Archive, not processed expression matrices or curated study metadata from GEO.

evals.prompt: Show me TP53 mutation status and copy-number alterations across the TCGA pan-cancer cohort in cBioPortal.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-cbioportal. The user wants somatic mutation and copy-number data across a clinical tumor cohort, not gene expression datasets from GEO.
